title: Qdrant
description: Industry-standard monitoring dashboard for Qdrant vector database cluster in qdrant-prod-ns namespace on divyam-prod-k8s-cluster. Covers cluster health, collections, Qdrant memory allocator, Kubernetes resource utilization, network I/O, and container health. Designed for proactive degradation detection.

definition.content:
## Qdrant Vector Database

**Cluster:** divyam-prod-k8s-cluster
**Namespace:** qdrant-prod-ns
**StatefulSet:** qdrant-prod-sts (3 replicas)
**Image:** qdrant:v1.13.4

**Degradation signals:**
- Recovery mode active
- Pending ops increasing
- Memory trending up
- CPU throttling
- Container restarts

Qdrant jemalloc memory allocator internals. **Active** = in-use pages. **Allocated** = app-allocated bytes. **Resident** = physical memory. **Retained** = virtual mappings held. **Metadata** = allocator overhead.

Watch for resident memory steadily increasing without stabilization -- may indicate unbounded growth or memory leak.
